contradicting_evidence: Mitigation:* Embed terminological clarity in *success metrics* (e.g., World Bank projects now track "epistemic fidelity scores" in policy outputs).
Mitigation:* *South-South Knowledge Pools* (e.g., Brazil’s UNESP University sharing decolonial policy templates with Ghana’s University of Cape Coast).
conj.state_variations: National Average:* Focuses on "structural inequality" in education/health policy, conflating structuralism (systemic analysis) with post-structuralism (discourse analysis).
